macro.title: White picket fences were the American Dream. Now people want higher walls. - The Washington Post
macro.summary: A white picket fence in the front yard once signified middle-class neighborliness. But hardly anyone buys them anymore.

macro.title: A hotly debated lung cancer drug cut the risk of death by 34% in a late-stage trial in China - CNBC
macro.summary: An experimental lung cancer drug from Akeso and Summit Therapeutics reduced the risk of death by 34% in a late-stage trial, according to data released Sunday.

macro.title: "Four-Letter Word": United Airlines 767 Returns To Newark After Bluetooth Name Sparks Alert - Simple Flying
macro.summary: The flight crew issued repeated warnings and a one-minute ultimatum to passengers, demanding they turn off their Bluetooth devices.
